scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,bff -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w bff"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n client,bff,admin -c cyan,magenta,green "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w bff" "npm run dev -w admin"
scripts.dev:mock: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build:all: npm run build -w bff && npm run build -w client && npm run build -w admin
